subject and companion walked away from stranded car.  companion turned back because of weather, subject did not.  never seen again.  major snow storm in area 1st night out.  subject not reported missing for 4 days.

subject "a", who had been drinking, walked awayfrom camp, at rampart range mm 3, at approximately midnight on 5/29/94.  subject "b", who had also been drinking, left the campsite to look for subject "a".  arp was contacted at 0240 hrs, about 30 minutes af
subject was checking fence line.  got leg cramps and was not able to walk back to road.
subjects left home, headed up gold camp road, to collect fire wood.  expected back by 2000-2100 hrs that evening.  should have been at work this morning.
